introSection: Jet Star was a steel roller coaster previously located at Casino Pier in Seaside Heights, New Jersey, USA. It operated from 1969 to 2000. It was subsequently scrapped and the cars were sold.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This was a Schwarzkopf Jet Star installation.

fullText:
Jet Star was a steel roller coaster previously located at Casino Pier in Seaside Heights, New Jersey, USA. It operated from 1969 to 2000. It was subsequently scrapped and the cars were sold.

This was a Schwarzkopf Jet Star installation.
